title: [Nyessem, Promenade]
description: The walkway narrows here, set between a white stone wall lined with a long marble relief of lush Nyessemian vines and one carved with arch-shaped hollows.  Sculpted between the relief's stone tendrils is a pale green stone arch, with emerald-threaded curtains cinched above.  At one end of the walkway is a narrow slope alongside a tall, vine-carved white stone fountain.  The other end leads back to the promenade's main square.  Above, a pale blue mist mimicking a cloudy sky flows like milky water.
